title: Daily Report Automation
problem: Managers spent 30+ minutes every morning compiling daily sales reports from spreadsheets by hand — copy-pasting rows, calculating totals, and formatting emails.
solution: A time-triggered Google Apps Script that auto-detects bilingual column headers (English & Japanese), aggregates KPIs by category/status, and delivers a mobile-friendly HTML report at 7 AM. Includes error logging and email alerts on failure.
result: Saves 2+ hours per week with zero manual intervention. Works out-of-the-box with existing Japanese or English spreadsheets — no schema migration required.

images.caption: Auto-generated HTML summary delivered to inbox at 7 AM daily
